name: blammytv
description: react-based iptv client (xtream codes + debrid). thin clients, backend-owned config.

scripts.desktop: concurrently -n server,app,electron -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @blammytv/server dev" "pnpm --filter @blammytv/app dev" "wait-on tcp:1420 && pnpm --filter @blammytv/desktop start"
